title: Mega Altaria Battle Guide
summary: A bulky [dragon]/[fairy] sweeper — [pixilate] converts [return] into a STAB [fairy] move, and [dragon-dance] turns it into a fast cleaner.
strengths: [dragon]/[fairy] typing is immune to [dragon] and resists Fighting
weaknesses: Bulk is serviceable but not exceptional

recommendedMoves.reason: Coverage for Poison and Steel walls
Mega turn safety and setup window

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Altaria is a bulky physical sweeper built around [pixilate] — the ability turns normal-type moves into [fairy] with a 1.2x boost. [return] becomes an effective ~120 BP [fairy] STAB, and a single [dragon-dance] makes Mega Altaria fast enough to clean up most offensive teams. 110/110/110 Mega-form bulk gives it the durability to set up safely.

## Strengths
[return] through [pixilate] and STAB is a very high damage output per click. The [dragon]/[fairy] typing grants a clean [dragon] immunity and resistances to Fighting, Bug, and Dark — Mega Altaria walls dragon attackers for free. [dragon-dance] boosts both Attack and Speed simultaneously, so one setup opens the door for a sweep.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Poison and Steel both resist [return], and Steel attackers like iron-head users threaten direct KOs. Ice is a 2x weakness as well. Speed 80 is slow, so the first [dragon-dance] has to come against something passive or a setup turn.

## Recommended Moveset
[return] is locked — it is the whole game plan. [dragon-dance] is the setup move. [earthquake] handles Poison and Steel walls that resist [return]. [protect] secures Mega turn and provides setup opportunities in doubles.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[altarianite] is mandatory. [pixilate] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [fairy] stacks on top of [pixilate] for maximum [return] output. Tera [dragon] keeps the Ice resistance and boosts any [dragon] move you run instead.

## Teammates & Synergy
Ground and Fire partners cover Poison and Steel walls. intimidate support extends physical bulk during setup. tailwind lets Mega Altaria skip the [dragon-dance] step and immediately clean up.

## Play Patterns
Mega evolve, [protect] to secure the turn, then look for a safe [dragon-dance] opportunity. After a boost, spam [return] into the opponent's pair and flex to [earthquake] when Steel is in range. Tera on a predicted super-effective hit to survive and finish.
